variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2032 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-6701
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2032 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-6701. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2032 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
